message:
test(mux-server): add proxy identity, codec version, and catch helper tests

Expand sessionhandler test coverage from 14 to 20 tests:
- SetClientId proxy path stores identity and ignores duplicates
- GetCodecVersion returns valid version info and executable path
- catch helper propagates both Ok and Err results correctly
- Multiple PerPane entries maintain independent state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
